snippets.title: Boris Cherny on coding and enterprise
snippets.takeaway: I also have Claude monitoring Slack channels to proactively respond to people to answer their questions and draft PRs, and to react with specific emojis like ✅❌ when a thread is...
snippets.summary: Boris Cherny (bcherny on X) shared 3 recent updates. I also have Claude monitoring Slack channels to proactively respond to people to answer their questions and draft PRs, and to react with specific emojis like ✅❌ when a thread is resolved. To set it up, just add @.Claude to a channel and ask it to do this^, in natural language. That's it. Point it at a channel, give it a task, and let it work. It's in beta on Slack today for Claude Enterprise and Team customers.

snippets.title: Madhu Guru on agents and enterprise
snippets.takeaway: I’ve had the chance to see this ecosystem from the different sides - enterprises, agent startups, data providers, labs.
snippets.summary: Madhu Guru (realmadhuguru on X) shared 1 recent update. I’ve had the chance to see this ecosystem from the different sides - enterprises, agent startups, data providers, labs. The core tension here is that the business models, moats, value exchange, execution playbooks for all players are being figured out in real time. This debate around token pricing is really a debate over where value will accrue - models, application layer, distribution or other layers.

snippets.title: Nikunj Kothari on models and product
snippets.takeaway: Introducing Plug That Shop 🔌 So @Shopify launched their UCP CLI that allows all the products on their stores available via the command line.
snippets.summary: Nikunj Kothari (nikunj on X) shared 2 recent updates. Introducing Plug That Shop 🔌 So @Shopify launched their UCP CLI that allows all the products on their stores available via the command line. I was thinking of interesting use cases for the CLI over the weekend and realized that I can use this to create contextual embedded shops for websites. So now, you can enter your website and get four HIGHLY relevant shops that you can embed in just one click.

snippets.title: Biohub: The Future of Biology is Open-Source with Co-Founders Mark Zuckerberg, Priscilla Chan, and Head of Science Alex Rives
snippets.takeaway: Enterprise AI is moving from chat rollout toward agentic workflows, with token budgets, rollout speed, and workflow integration becoming the practical bottlenecks.
snippets.summary: I think one of the really interesting things that we've been seeing is people kind of connecting it with AgenTex systems to just kind of do automated design and kind of just automate that whole process. And yet, you know, the AI scientists that work here could also go work in commercial enterprises. And, you know, we're in the age of information theory at scale, and we have these systems that can basically kind of predict the next token, and they can, learn world models from that.
